g.text: Der ZETA Client hat ein gültiges Access Token für den Zugriff auf den Resource Server.
Authorization: DPoP <Access Token for RS> DPoP: <DPoP Proof for RS>
Verify Access Token and DPoP Proof for RS
Authorization: DPoP <Access Token for ZETA/ASL> DPoP: <DPoP Proof for ZETA/ASL>
Authorization: DPoP <Access Token for RS> DPoP: <DPoP Proof for RS>
verify Access Token and DPoP Proof for ZETA/ASL
